name: Slice Lattice Data
description: Reads a paginated slice of entries from a vector, map, or set at any resolvable lattice path. Returns {type, values, count, offset}. For vectors/sets, values is an array of elements; for maps, each entry is {key, value}. Use after covia_list reveals a large collection. Default limit is 100; pass offset to page through. Examples: covia_slice path=v/ops/agent (all agent ops), covia_slice path=g/my-agent/timeline limit=10 (latest run records).

path.description: Any resolvable path pointing at a collection. Examples: 'v/ops/agent' (catalog sub-tree), 'w/events', 'g/my-agent/timeline'.

limit.description: Maximum number of entries to return (default 100).

type.description: Collection type: Vector, Map, or Set

values.description: The entries in the requested range. For maps, each entry is {key, value}.

count.description: Total number of entries in the collection
